name: ExtensionMedicinalProductDefinition_Version
title: R5: A business identifier relating to a specific version of the product (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicinalProductDefinition.version` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicinalProductDefinition.version` 0..1 `string`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.version` 0..1 `string`
*  R4B: `MedicinalProductDefinition.version` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.version` has a context of MedicinalProduct based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicinalProduct`.
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.version` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: A business identifier relating to a specific version of the product (new)
element.comment:

element.short: A business identifier relating to a specific version of the product
element.definition: A business identifier relating to a specific version of the product, this is commonly used to support revisions to an existing product.
